I0089.title: AUDNZD-Kointegrations-Mean-Reversion
I0089.explore: corr(-z, fwd_return) ~ 0 across lookback 20-90 x horizon 1-20; conditional fwd returns same-signed = drift not reversion
I0089.reason: daily z-score MR shows no reversion edge; ADF-gated also negative; original M30 frequency not testable on free data (<=60d).

I0090.title: FX-Carry + Momentum-Filter (re-test I0020)
I0090.reason: spot trend-timing negative; optimistic +3%/yr net carry only lifts to break-even (~0); carry-unwind MaxDD -32%; confirms I0020/0048/0083.

I0091.title: Overnight-Gap-Reversal Index (conditioned)
I0091.verdict: weak diversifier / overlay candidate (NOT standalone lead)
I0091.reason: real signal (perm 0.01-0.04, DSR 0.96, IS/OOS stable, no fat-tail) BUT crash-bounce-concentrated, recent decay 2021-24, equity-beta-adjacent (only +0.29/0.33 corr to living RSI2-MR); win 53% << >65% RRR<1 needs; survives only on close-exits.
